tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
mac access-list extended BLOCK_MAC_UBUNTU
deny host 0242.f8b3.2d00 any
permit any any
ip access-list extended BLOCK_ICMP_FROM_UBUNTU
deny icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
permit ip any any
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
switchport
no shutdown
mac access-group BLOCK_MAC_UBUNTU in
ip access-group BLOCK_ICMP_FROM_UBUNTU in
end
show access-lists
show mac access-list
show running-config interface GigabitEthernet0/1"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#mac access-list extended BLOCK_MAC_UBUNTU
Switch(config-ext-macl)#deny host 0242.f8b3.2d00 any
Switch(config-ext-macl)#permit any any
Switch(config-ext-macl)#ip access-list extended BLOCK_ICMP_FROM_UBUNTU
Switch(config-ext-nacl)#deny icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)#permit ip any any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)#interface GigabitEthernet0/1
Switch(config-if)#switchport
Switch(config-if)#no shutdown
Switch(config-if)#mac access-group BLOCK_MAC_UBUNTU in
Switch(config-if)#ip access-group BLOCK_ICMP_FROM_UBUNTU in
Switch(config-if)#end
Switch#show access-lists
Extended IP access list BLOCK_ICMP_FROM_UBUNTU
    10 deny icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
    20 permit ip any any
Extended IP access list CISCO-CWA-URL-REDIRECT-ACL
    100 deny udp any any eq domain
    101 deny tcp any any eq domain
    102 deny udp any eq bootps any
    103 deny udp any any eq bootpc
    104 deny udp any eq bootpc any
    105 permit tcp any any eq www
Extended IP access list preauth_ipv4_acl (per-user)
    10 permit udp any any eq domain
    20 permit tcp any any eq domain
    30 permit udp any eq bootps any
    40 permit udp any any eq bootpc
    50 permit udp any eq bootpc any
    60 deny ip any any
IPv6 access list preauth_ipv6_acl (per-user)
    permit udp any any eq domain sequence 10
    permit tcp any any eq domain sequence 20
    permit icmp any any nd-ns sequence 30
    permit icmp any any nd-na sequence 40
    permit icmp any any router-solicitation sequence 50
         
Switch#how mac access-list
        ^
